subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the sweet savours of God! Make haste, make haste towards the forgiveness and mercy of thy Lord
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب من نفحات الله البدار البدار الی مغفره من ربک و رحمه العجل العجل
subcodes.subjects: @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @call to action, @exhortations and counsels, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity
